name: Win Susp Computer Name Containing Samtheadmin
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: elhoim
SIGMA Title: Win Susp Computer Name Containing Samtheadmin
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious computer name samtheadmin-{1..100}$ generated by hacktool

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE 'samtheadmin-%' AND LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%$') OR (LOWER("Target Username") LIKE 'samtheadmin-%' AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE '%$')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Win Susp Computer Name Containing Samtheadmin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE 'samtheadmin-%' AND LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%$') OR (LOWER("Target Username") LIKE 'samtheadmin-%' AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE '%$')) AQL filter query
